initialUserPrompt: Bug 1 — Find and fix the Assignment to constant variable crash. Bug 2 — Fix file tool access so agent reads real files instead of hallucinating. Bug 3 — Rename GABy to SUNy everywhere.

items.name: Bug 1: Fix 'Assignment to constant variable' crash — find const reassignments
Bug 2: Fix file tool access — add error logging to read_file, make failures throw real errors
Bug 3: Rename GABy → SUNy across all files (UI, server, README, narrator)
